# hetzner-robot_server_addon_order (Resource)

Orders an add-on (extra IP, subnet, etc.) for an existing server (`POST /order/server_addon/transaction`).

~> `test = true` (default) validates only. `test = false` places a **real, billable** order. Destroying the resource does **not** remove the add-on.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hetzner-robot_server_addons" "avail" {
  server_number = 2093885
}

resource "hetzner-robot_server_addon_order" "extra_ip" {
  server_number = 2093885
  product_id    = "failover_ip"
  test          = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `product_id` (String) Add-on product ID (see the hetzner-robot_server_addons data source)
- `server_number` (Number) Server number to add the add-on to

### Optional

- `test` (Boolean) If true (default), validate the order only. Set to false to place a real, billable order.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String) Order status
- `transaction_id` (String) Order transaction ID
